title: Rēzekne still trying to rent out its unwanted spa complex
summary_full: Rēzekne City Council has approved changes to the auction rules for the lease rights of a spa complex [routinely rendered in Latvian as 'SPA' for reasons which remain opaque] at its July 17th meeting in a bid to get the enormous white elephant off its hands.
